name: Web / SaaS application
summary: A multi-tenant, browser-delivered transactional application served over HTTP, with server-side business logic, a persistent datastore, and per-tenant user accounts. Connected, always-on, cloud-hosted.

concerns: authentication (MFA, SSO/OIDC/SAML), session management and fixation, password/credential policy
authorization: per-tenant isolation and role/permission model (no cross-tenant data access)
input validation against OWASP Top 10 (injection, XSS, CSRF, SSRF)
encryption in transit (TLS) and of sensitive data at rest; secrets/key management
audit logging of security-relevant actions; dependency/supply-chain scanning
questions: Is tenant isolation specified so no tenant can reach another's data?
Are authN (MFA/SSO), session lifetime, and password policy defined?
Is protection against the OWASP Top 10 required, and is there an audit trail?

concerns: availability SLO/SLA and its measurement window
graceful degradation when a dependency (DB, cache, third-party) fails
backups, RTO/RPO, disaster recovery across zones/regions
idempotency of mutating operations and safe retries
questions: Is an availability target with a measurement window stated?
Are RTO/RPO and backup/restore requirements defined?
Is behaviour on datastore/third-party outage specified?

concerns: page/API latency targets (p95/p99) and throughput
behaviour under concurrent tenants and peak load
horizontal scaling / autoscaling strategy
pagination and query efficiency for large tenants
questions: Are p95/p99 latency and throughput targets quantified for key flows?
Is behaviour under peak concurrent load and the scaling strategy defined?

concerns: tenant data model, schemas, migrations
retention, export, and deletion (incl. tenant offboarding)
data quality and validation at ingestion
backup encryption and PII classification
questions: Are retention, export and deletion (tenant offboarding) rules defined?
Is PII classified and its handling specified?

concerns: onboarding/learnability for new tenants and users
error prevention on destructive actions (delete tenant, bulk ops)
responsive UI across viewports and browsers
consistent, discoverable navigation and feedback
questions: Are safeguards for destructive/bulk actions required?
Are supported browsers/viewports and responsiveness specified?

concerns: WCAG 2.2 AA conformance for public/enterprise buyers
keyboard navigation and screen-reader support
localization / i18n (languages, locales, RTL, formats)
questions: Is a WCAG 2.2 conformance level required?
Are localization/i18n requirements (languages, locales) stated?

concerns: GDPR/CCPA: lawful basis, consent, data-subject rights (access, erasure, portability)
data residency / sovereignty per tenant region
DPA and sub-processor obligations
cookie/tracking consent
questions: Are GDPR/CCPA obligations (consent, DSAR, erasure) specified?
Are data-residency constraints per region stated?

concerns: monitoring, alerting, on-call and runbooks
zero/low-downtime deploys, feature flags, rollback
multi-tenant configuration and per-tenant limits/quotas
cost/capacity operations
questions: Are monitoring/alerting and on-call runbook requirements defined?
Are deploy/rollback and per-tenant quota/limit requirements stated?

concerns: automated test coverage and CI gates
structured logging/metrics/tracing
modular service boundaries, API versioning
questions: Are automated-test-coverage and observability requirements stated?
Is API versioning/backward-compatibility addressed?

concerns: activation/retention and task-success metrics
time-to-value for new tenants
user trust and satisfaction (support, SLAs)
questions: Are user-outcome/success metrics (activation, task success) defined?
